title: Purple Web
description: Makes cobwebs to an nice looking purple one.
body:
If you want that your cobwebs look better or more colorful while fighting against other players and mobs this texture pack is perfect for you. The texturepack changes the normal cobweb texture to an good looking purple one.

If you have any questions, feedback, or personal inquiries of any kind, feel free to join my [Discord](https://discord.gg/kX5NjxndyY) server. There, you can use the ticket system to contact me directly.
